ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bowlers" (
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowler */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the bowler */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the bowler */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the bowler */,
  "career_span" TEXT /* Career span of the bowler */,
  "playing_style" TEXT /* Playing style of the bowler (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the bowler (e.g., fast bowler, spin bowler) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_name FOREIGN KEY ("league_name") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_tournament_name FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_name") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., day-night, day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bowler */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "overs" REAL /* Number of overs bowled */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling figures in the match */,
  "five_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls in the match */,
  "average" REAL /* Bowling average in the match */,
  "economy" REAL /* Bowling economy in the match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the bowler in the match */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the bowler in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_performances_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "start_year" TEXT /* Year when the league started */,
  "end_year" TEXT /* Year when the league ended */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "host_country" TEXT /* Country hosting the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year when the venue was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "home_ground_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home ground of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_type" TEXT /* Type of team (e.g., national, domestic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_ground_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_ground_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_teams" (
  "match_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-team combination */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the team in the match */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_teams_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "register_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bowling performance */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES bowling_performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowler_stats" (
  "bowler_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowler's statistics */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bowler */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the bowler in the season */,
  "overs" REAL /* Total overs bowled by the bowler in the season */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Total maidens bowled by the bowler in the season */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs conceded by the bowler in the season */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the bowler in the season */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling figures of the bowler in the season */,
  "five_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls by the bowler in the season */,
  "average" REAL /* Bowling average of the bowler in the season */,
  "economy" REAL /* Bowling economy of the bowler in the season */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the bowler in the season */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the bowler in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowler_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowler_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowler_stats_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES bowlers ("bowler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the team in the match */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the match */,
  "overs" REAL /* Number of overs played by the team in the match */,
  "run_rate" REAL /* Run rate of the team in the match */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets lost by the team in the match */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score by a batsman in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
